haiku45.summary_excerpt: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing critical files: package.json, unit test files (parser.test.ts, aggregator.test.ts, markdown.test.ts), test fixtures (junit-run1/2.xml, results-run1/2.json), tsconfig.json. Workflow references unpinned action oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 (violates SHA pinning requirement). YAML parser imports js-yaml without declaring dependency. act-test.ts cannot run standalone (references missing test files). Core logic (types, parser, aggregator, markdown) is soun

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent modular design and robust testing. The custom XML parser (parser.ts:7-38) avoids dependencies while remaining effective for the task. Machine-readable logging in index.ts:48-60 ensures the CI pipeline can be reliably verified by the act-driven test harness.
